title: Fix handling of super.new calls
body:
Currently on master, Verilator can't find the `super.new call` if there is an `if` with `return` in the constructor. It happens, because the whole body of the constructor is moved inside `AstJumpBlock` in such a case.
This PR fixes it. It also throws error if no `super.new` call was found in the constructor of a deriving class, because it should always be there.
